name: web-to-app
description: A native Android application that converts any website URL into a standalone Android App.
readme_summary: WebToApp is an on-device Android application that transforms websites, HTML projects, and various local runtimes into standalone Android APKs. It offers a comprehensive suite of tools for building, customizing, and managing these apps directly on your phone without relying on remote services.
key_features: On-device APK building for websites and local runtimes
Supports various input types: URL, project folder, media library
Customizable WebView, toolbar, splash screen, permissions, and signing
Extensible with JS/CSS modules and userscripts
Supports multiple runtime environments including Node.js, PHP, Python, Go, and WordPress
Preview, build, sign, install, share, export, and back up generated apps
primary_use_case: To allow users to easily convert any website or web project into a fully functional, installable Android application directly from their mobile device.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan in a workshop, holding a smartphone that displays a website. With magical tools emanating from the phone, the artisan is crafting a miniature, perfectly formed Android robot figurine from the website's content. The website's elements (text, images) are visibly flowing from the phone screen into the robot. Subtle digital particles and UI elements from the WebToApp interface are visible on the phone screen. The background is a clean, modern workshop with soft, focused lighting. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant colors and clear, friendly iconography.

name: mcp-ssh-manager
description: MCP SSH Server: 37 tools for remote SSH management | Claude Code & OpenAI Codex | DevOps automation, backups, database operations, health monitoring
readme_summary: MCP SSH Manager is a Node.js server that allows AI models like Claude Code and OpenAI Codex to manage remote SSH servers. It provides a framework for AI to execute commands, transfer files, manage databases, perform backups, and monitor server health, enabling sophisticated DevOps automation.
key_features: AI-powered remote server management via Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Support for Claude Code and OpenAI Codex
Execute commands on remote SSH servers
Dead-code detection and removal in CI
primary_use_case: Enabling AI models to automate and manage remote server infrastructure through a unified protocol.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, ancient librarian sitting at a grand oak desk, holding a glowing orb that represents an AI assistant. The orb projects beams of light, transforming into intricate, interconnected gears and pipes that represent remote servers. The librarian is calmly directing these beams to perform tasks like organizing books (data management), polishing server casings (health monitoring), and securely locking vaults (backups). Subtle digital code streams flow around the scene, and the repository name 'MCP SSH Manager' is etched into the desk. The overall mood is one of calm, intelligent control over complex systems. The style should be a detailed digital painting with a warm, inviting color palette and clear, defined outlines.

name: FreeDomain
description: DigitalPlat FreeDomain: Free Domain For Everyone
readme_summary: DigitalPlat FreeDomain provides free domain names to individuals and organizations, aiming to make digital identity accessible to everyone. Users can register unique domain extensions and connect them to their preferred DNS providers.
key_features: Compatibility with popular DNS providers (Cloudflare, Afraid.org, Hostry)
primary_use_case: To offer free domain names, enabling individuals and organizations to establish an online presence without financial barriers.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, open gateway made of glowing digital particles, symbolizing free access to the internet. On one side, a diverse crowd of people (individuals, small business owners) are happily walking through the gateway, each holding a unique, stylized key representing their new domain name. On the other side, a welcoming digital landscape unfolds with simple, clean website icons. Subtle UI elements showing domain registration forms and DNS settings are integrated into the gateway's structure. The overall mood is empowering and accessible, with a clean, modern flat design style and a bright, optimistic color palette. The repository name 'DigitalPlat FreeDomain' is subtly integrated into the gateway's design.

name: FastVideo
description: A unified inference and post-training framework for accelerated video generation.
readme_summary: FastVideo is a unified framework for accelerating video generation through post-training techniques and optimized inference. It supports various training methods like finetuning and distillation, and offers significant performance improvements for real-time video generation and editing.
key_features: End-to-end post-training support for bidirectional and autoregressive models
Data preprocessing pipeline for video, image, and text data
Sparse attention with Video Sparse Attention
Scalable training with FSDP2, sequence parallelism, and selective activation checkpointing
Diverse hardware and OS support (H100, A100, 4090, Linux, Windows, MacOS)
Realtime video generation & editing with Dreamverse
primary_use_case: Accelerated video generation and real-time inference for diffusion models.
cover_image_prompt: A futuristic film director in a high-tech studio, orchestrating a symphony of light and color. Instead of a traditional orchestra, they are conducting streams of digital particles that coalesce into vibrant, dynamic video clips on a large screen. The director uses a gestural interface, with glowing lines connecting their hands to the particle streams, symbolizing control and acceleration. Subtle UI elements showing frame rates and processing speeds are visible on a nearby console. The overall mood is one of creative power and speed, with a clean, modern aesthetic and a vibrant color palette. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style, emphasizing the seamless integration of technology and creativity in video generation.

name: twenty
description: The open alternative to Salesforce, designed for AI.
readme_summary: Twenty is an open-source, AI-native CRM platform built with TypeScript, designed to be customizable and extensible. It allows technical teams to define CRM objects, fields, and views as code, enabling them to build and version their CRM like any other part of their software stack.
key_features: Extensible with apps, agents, and logic functions
Cloud, self-hosted, and local development options
CLI for app scaffolding and publishing
primary_use_case: Enabling technical teams to build and customize their own CRM solutions using code, offering an open-source and extensible alternative to traditional CRM platforms.
cover_image_prompt: A master architect meticulously building a complex, interconnected city using digital blueprints and glowing code blocks. The city represents a CRM, with distinct districts for sales, marketing, and customer service. The architect is shown assembling modular components, symbolizing the 'objects as code' feature. Subtle data streams flow between buildings, representing AI integration. Small screens embedded in the cityscape display snippets of TypeScript code and visual representations of data. The overall scene is a vibrant, futuristic metropolis rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style, emphasizing modularity and digital construction. The repository name 'Twenty' is subtly integrated into a prominent building's signage.
